sections.title: Starting Rag and Bone Man I

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes. I'll give you a hand.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: You will? Excellent!

lines.speaker: Sack
lines.text: Sniggersnigger

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where do you need me to dig?

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Can I help you with something?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, err...who are you, and what are all these bones doing here?

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Errr...

lines.speaker: Sack
lines.text: Mumblemumble

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: I'm an archaeologist. I work with the museum.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: An archaeologist?

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Yes.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well that explains the bones...sort of...but what are you doing all the way out here?

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Errr...

lines.speaker: Sack
lines.text: Mumblemumble. Mumblemumblemumble.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: I'm collecting bones for the museum.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: They have asked me to rig up some displays of second and third age creatures using their bones, so that people can come and...well, look at them.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: I need to get them into some sort of order before I begin, but I've run into a bit of a snag.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What sort of a snag?

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Well, I need to have all the bones I'm going to use here, and placed into some sort of order.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: However, I seem to have discovered I am a few short.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Anything I can do to help?

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Errr...

lines.speaker: Sack
lines.text: Mumblemumble

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: There is something you could do for me. I'm going to be busy...err...

lines.speaker: Sack
lines.text: Mumble

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Sorting, yes, sorting these bones out ready for the museum, but I need a few more.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Will you help me out by grabbing some?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes. I'll give you a hand.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: You will? Excellent!

lines.speaker: Sack
lines.text: Snicker.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where do you need me to dig?

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Dig?

lines.speaker: Sack
lines.text: Mumblemumble

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Oh, you must have got the wrong end of the stick.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: I need some fresh, whole bones to replace ones that have become damaged.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Err...

lines.speaker: Sack
lines.text: Mumblemumblemumblemumblemumble. Mumblemumblemumblemumble. Mumble.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Excuse me...

lines.speaker: Sack
lines.text: Shhh!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry...

lines.speaker: Sack
lines.text: Mumblemumble. Mumblemumblemumble.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Ok, got it.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Ok, here is the thing. While sorting out what bones I do have I managed to lose or damage a few. If you can get me some fresh, unbroken bones to use as replacements then I can get on with things.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: That make things clearer?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, it makes some sense I suppose...

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Great. If you can get me a bone from a Goblin, a Bear, a Big Frog, a Ram, a Unicorn, a Monkey, a Giant rat and a Giant Bat then I'll be able to move on with the...

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Displays...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So you just want me to bring you these bones and that will be that?

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Well, I wouldn't mind you sticking them in a pot and boiling them in vinegar first, if you don't mind.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: There is a Wine Merchant in Draynor called Fortunato that sells the stuff you'll need.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: You can even use my pot-boiler if you want.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why do I need to boil them in vinegar?

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: It gets them bright and sparking white.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: It's an archaeologist thing.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Just put the bone in a pot of vinegar, throw some logs on the fire, put the pot in the holder and light the logs.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: It takes a while for the vinegar to evaporate, but the bone will be nice and clean in the end.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: All right, I'll be back later.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Bye!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Oh...I see.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Well, never mind me young man, I'll just stagger over here under my massive burden, and continue my thankless task.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Unaided and alone...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow, trying a guilt trip much?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well good luck with that!

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Thanks stranger!

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: What a polite young [man/woman]...

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Well, back to work!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where is that mumbling coming from?

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Errr...

lines.speaker: Sack
lines.text: Mumblemumble

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: What mumbling?

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Anyway, I have enough problems of my own without dealing with a delusional adventurer.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I was just passing and I wondered if you still needed someone to help with the bones?

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Errr...

lines.speaker: Sack
lines.text: Mumblemumble

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: There is something you could do for me. I'm going to be busy...err...

lines.speaker: Sack
lines.text: Mumble

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Sorting, yes, sorting these bones out ready for the museum, but I need a few more.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Will you help me out by grabbing some?

lines.speaker: Fortunato
lines.text: Can I help you at all?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Have you got any vinegar?

lines.speaker: Fortunato
lines.text: Vinegar?

lines.speaker: Fortunato
lines.text: Vinegar!

lines.speaker: Fortunato
lines.text: The very idea! My wines are the finest in the district!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry! I was told to come and speak with a wine merchant about getting some vinegar, I must have the wrong person.

lines.speaker: Fortunato
lines.text: Wait...did HE send you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: If by HE you mean the old man with the sack of bones, then yes.

lines.speaker: Fortunato
lines.text: Aaaah...say no more sir, I have some in specially.

lines.speaker: Fortunato
lines.text: Can I help you at all?

lines.speaker: Fortunato
lines.text: Ah! Good afternoon your lordship. I take it you have come for a refill?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not today.

lines.speaker: Fortunato
lines.text: Well, just remember I have some in stock for you when you want it.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Have you brought me any bones?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not at the moment. Can you just give me a run down on which bones I have left to get?

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Sure.

lines.speaker: Sack
lines.text: Mumblemumble

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: You still need to bring me a Goblin bone.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Goblins are relatively common. I hear there is a house full of them around Lumbridge in fact.

lines.speaker: Sack
lines.text: Mumblemumble

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: You still need to bring me a Bear bone.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: I heard that there are some Bears over by the Legends' Guild, near Ardougne.

lines.speaker: Sack
lines.text: Mumblemumble

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: You still need to bring me a Big Frog bone.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: This might be a little tricky as you will need to go into the Lumbridge Swamp caves. You will need a light source! Never forget your light source down there!

lines.speaker: Sack
lines.text: Mumblemumble

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: You still need to bring me a Ram bone.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: I'm sure you will be able to find a ram wherever there are sheep.

lines.speaker: Sack
lines.text: Mumblemumble

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: You still need to bring me a Unicorn bone.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: I seem to remember that there were Unicorns south of Varrock, I think they might be there still.

lines.speaker: Sack
lines.text: Mumblemumble

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: You still need to bring me a Monkey bone.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Monkeys tend to live in Jungle areas, like Karamja. I think they are pretty plentiful there if I remember correctly.

lines.speaker: Sack
lines.text: Mumblemumble

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: You still need to bring me a Giant Rat bone.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: If you can't find one in a sewer, then you might want to try looking in some caves.

lines.speaker: Sack
lines.text: Mumblemumble

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: You still need to bring me a Giant Bat bone.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Giant bats tend to live underground, but I have heard there are a few near the Coal Pits.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Did you get all that?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes. I'll get right on it.

lines.speaker: Sack
lines.text: Mumblemumble

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Don't forget to boil them in vinegar first.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Just chuck some logs into the pit, put the bone in the pot of vinegar and drop it onto the pot-boiler. Then light the logs and wait for the the vinegar to boil away.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, I'll remember.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have some bones for you.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Great! Let me take a look at them.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Wonderful! I'll put this with the rest.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No problem. I'll be back if I find some more.

sections.title: Trying to hand in unclean bones

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have some bones for you.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Great! Just clean them up in the pot-boiler and hand them over.

sections.title: Trying to hand in a bone while its in a pot of vinegar

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have some bones for you.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Great! Let me take a look at them.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: That's the last of them!

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: The museum will be thrilled to know I've completed the collection.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well I'm just glad I could help.

lines.speaker: Sack
lines.text: Mumblemumble

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Well you've been a big help and no mistake.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: I'm always on the lookout for fresh bones, so if you see some bring them right over.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No problem, I'll be sure to bring anything you might like over if I find something.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I can't wait to see the displays once they are finished.
